response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided lyrics for 'Shunkan Heartbeat'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference lyrics for transcription and translation, supplementing with manual timing for the intro shout and visual text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed visual titles at the start, followed by the Kabuki-style intro shout, and then synchronized the lyrics to the vocal performance, ensuring instantaneous transitions during rapid delivery.

subtitles.original: ミラクル重大発表祭り
subtitles.english: [Visual: Miracle Major Announcement Festival]

subtitles.original: らでん新衣装お披露目3Dライブ
subtitles.english: [Visual: Raden's New Outfit Reveal 3D Live]

subtitles.original: いよーっ！
subtitles.english: Iyo-!

subtitles.original: 漠然とした不安欲していた Fun
subtitles.english: Vague anxiety, I was craving fun

subtitles.original: 日常に違和感？うんざりしていた
subtitles.english: Did I feel out of place in daily life? I was sick of it

subtitles.original: 見慣れたありきたりな眺め
subtitles.english: The usual scenery I was used to

subtitles.original: 理屈を超える変化を求めていた
subtitles.english: I was looking for a change that would go beyond logic

subtitles.original: 窮屈で退屈な日々の中
subtitles.english: In the midst of stifling and boring days

subtitles.original: 突然 キミは現れた
subtitles.english: Suddenly, you appeared

subtitles.original: 全身の細胞 駆け巡るように
subtitles.english: As if running through every cell in my whole body

subtitles.original: 走り出した未完成なストーリー
subtitles.english: An unfinished story that started to run

subtitles.original: モノクロだった景色が今
subtitles.english: The scenery that was monochrome, now

subtitles.original: キミと出会い カラフルに彩る Brand New World
subtitles.english: Meeting you, it gets colored colorfully, Brand New World

subtitles.original: ココロ奪われた
subtitles.english: My heart was stolen

subtitles.original: 気まぐれな瞬間ハートビート
subtitles.english: A capricious, momentary heartbeat

subtitles.original: 揺らぐ時空の狭間
subtitles.english: In the gaps of wavering space-time

subtitles.original: もうひとりじゃない煌めく星
subtitles.english: I am not alone anymore, a shimmering star

subtitles.original: 描く未来予想図は
subtitles.english: The future forecast I'm drawing

subtitles.original: 同じ夢を引き寄せたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to draw the same dream together

subtitles.original: 果てしない旅路の向こうで
subtitles.english: Beyond the endless journey

subtitles.original: 鳴り止まない ロマンが待っている
subtitles.english: A romance that won't stop ringing is waiting

subtitles.original: 気づいた時にはね
subtitles.english: When I realized it

subtitles.original: I can't live without you
subtitles.english: I can't live without you

subtitles.original: いつまでも キミと一緒なら
subtitles.english: If I'm with you forever

subtitles.original: ここから先 広がる宇宙
subtitles.english: The universe that expands from here on

subtitles.original: 晴れ渡る空 飛び出して
subtitles.english: Flying out into the clear sky

subtitles.original: 気分は上々 想像以上
subtitles.english: My mood is top-notch, beyond imagination

subtitles.original: 机上の空論は終わりにして
subtitles.english: Let's end the empty theories on paper

subtitles.original: すべて叶える 絵空事
subtitles.english: Making everything come true, a fantasy

subtitles.original: 時計の針が回り回る
subtitles.english: The clock's hands spin and turn

subtitles.original: 限られた時の中で 鮮やかに Dancing Time
subtitles.english: Vividly in limited time, Dancing Time

subtitles.original: ココロ奪われた
subtitles.english: My heart was stolen

subtitles.original: 気まぐれな瞬間ハートビート
subtitles.english: A capricious, momentary heartbeat

subtitles.original: 揺らぐ時空の狭間
subtitles.english: In the gaps of wavering space-time

subtitles.original: もうひとりじゃない煌めく星
subtitles.english: I am not alone anymore, a shimmering star

subtitles.original: 描く未来予想図は
subtitles.english: The future forecast I'm drawing

subtitles.original: 同じ夢を引き寄せたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to draw the same dream together

subtitles.original: 果てしない旅路の向こうに
subtitles.english: Beyond the endless journey

subtitles.original: 紛れもない奇跡があるはず
subtitles.english: There must be a clear miracle

subtitles.original: さよならメランコリック
subtitles.english: Goodbye, melancholic

subtitles.original: 止められはしない この衝動
subtitles.english: I can't stop this impulse

subtitles.original: 突き進むだけさ
subtitles.english: I'm just going to push forward

subtitles.original: 形振りかまわず Are you ready？
subtitles.english: Without minding my appearance, are you ready?

subtitles.original: 限界はないさ 純度無限大の異次元
subtitles.english: There is no limit, a dimension of infinite purity

subtitles.original: 散りばめた閃き 夜空 漲ってゆく
subtitles.english: Scattered flashes, overflowing in the night sky

subtitles.original: 喜びは哀しみの倍 分かち合っていこう
subtitles.english: Let's share joy twice as much as sadness

subtitles.original: キミとならどこまでも
subtitles.english: If I'm with you, anywhere.
